# Purpose
This code is a C source file that includes a series of header files, each prefixed with `stubs_`. These headers likely define stub functions or mock implementations for various components such as application state, heap management, user interface, logging, and system calls. The purpose of these stubs is to provide placeholder implementations that can be used during development or testing, allowing the main application to compile and run without requiring the full implementation of these components. This approach is useful for isolating and testing specific parts of a program without dependencies on the complete system.
